title: George King (basketball, born 1994)
extract: George McZavier King Jr. (born January 15, 1994) is an American professional basketball player for Gladiators Trier of the German Basketball Bundesliga (BBL). He played college basketball for the Colorado Buffaloes, earning second-team all-conference honors in the Pac-12 as a senior in 2018. He was selected by the Phoenix Suns in the second round of the 2018 NBA draft.
